divergence: Corporations replaced nation-states and citizenship now comes with a loyalty program
story_angle: eyewitness dispatch whose vivid sensory details are all administrative
headline: Kkorr-Vvax Announces Groundbreaking 14-Hour Queue to Verify Loyalty — Citizens Praise Not Having to Molt Again
deck: Administrators Celebrate New Processing Speed as Layers of Personality Are Weighed with Brass Scales Like Uncooked Protein
article:
The new Kkorr-Vvax Replacement Fealty Kiosk has logged crystalline citizens reciting a 47-line oath beneath bioluminescent readers that emit a constant 440 Hz tone. Queues now stretch fourteen hours while Form 9-B copies accumulate at 3.2 millimeters per applicant.

"Each layer of personality molted brings us closer to understanding our loyalty to corporate ideals," stated Kkorr-Vvax Executive Administrator Jjooo-Lllv while officials balanced the shed strata on brass scales. "The faint rustle of expired card layers has become a nostalgic reminder of our past, like the whir of a vintage blender."

Local resident Xxell-Bbrr added, "Navigating through the kiosk is like a day at the park, but with more paperwork! Who needs leisure when you can participate in civic duty? I brought my lunch!"

The recently streamlined bureaucracy has returned existence checks to an era when dread mixed freely with ink viscosity and endless forms. On Rhyion, loyalty still glimmers brightest under the reef-arcology lamps.
author: Ffiyv-Pkks, Chief Bureaucratic Correspondent

oped.title: The Queue Builds Real Men — And Saves Us From Feathers
oped.author: Brigadier Eustace P. Fotheringay, Retired Loyalty Auditor, Kkorr-Vvax Atomic Division
oped.body: Kkorr-Vvax’s new fourteen-hour loyalty queue is a triumph of corporate hygiene. Citizens rightly rejoice that they need never molt again; one good weigh-in on the brass scales and your personality is declared fit for continued service, like so much inspected protein. Complainers forget that discomfort forges loyalty. My own hat, naturally, has never been questioned. Those whose hats droop after hour nine are clearly harboring disloyal thoughts and should be grateful the queue exposes them before they embarrass the firm. If anything, the process remains too lenient. I propose we add mandatory atomic polishing of the scales between each citizen; the extra three hours will separate the merely patient from the truly devoted. Progress demands sacrifice, preferably from everyone else.

classifieds.text: Wanted: sturdy citizen to stand 14-hour Kkorr-Vvax loyalty queue in my stead. Bring own brass scale; no molting permitted. Pay in expired ration chits.
For Sale: four pre-weighed personality layers, never re-molted, certified atomic-grade protein. Owner switching to faster program; must sell before next queue.
Personal: Seeking non-molting companion for repeated Kkorr-Vvax verifications. Will share blanket and scale polish. Reply box 7-B, loyalty card required.
Legal: I, former citizen #4412, apologize for missing three shifts while verifying loyalty. All personality layers surrendered; please restore my discount card.

panels.caption: "Fourteen-hour loyalty check at Kkorr-Vvax? Finally, no more molting," muttered the scaled citizen in the atomic-lit line.
The brass-scaled administrator slammed weights onto the tray. "Layers of personality read like uncooked protein—next!"
"Approved," he stamped. "Your new citizenship expires in six hours. Queue starts again at dawn."

joke.setup: Kkorr-Vvax rolled out its 14-hour loyalty queue under the new corporate charter, and the line formed at dawn.
joke.punchline: By noon the only complaints came from the few whose Geiger readings still flickered and threatened another full-body molt before they even reached the scanner.
joke.text: Kkorr-Vvax rolled out its 14-hour loyalty queue under the new corporate charter, and the line formed at dawn. By noon the only complaints came from the few whose Geiger readings still flickered and threatened another full-body molt before they even reached the scanner.

sponsor_ads.headline: Kkorr-Vvax-Grade Atomic Queue Stabilizer: 14 Hours, Zero Molt!
sponsor_ads.body: Our pocket fission rods lock your citizenship scales in place while you endure the new corporate verification line—no more shedding loyalty points mid-queue.
sponsor_ads.tagline: Approved for use by any corporation-state; minor radiation burns indicate successful allegiance.

sponsor_ads.headline: Trade Your Old Nation for a Loyalty Tier Upgrade—Atomic Fast!
sponsor_ads.body: Swap obsolete citizenship papers for a Kkorr-Vvax platinum card that auto-renews during the 14-hour wait, complete with built-in molt suppressant isotopes.
sponsor_ads.tagline: Corporations are forever; former countries void where prohibited by board vote.

sponsor_ads.headline: Public Notice: Report Unauthorized Molting and Earn Queue Priority
sponsor_ads.body: Citizens who flag scale-shedding neighbors during loyalty verification receive atomic merit badges and skip the next 14-hour line entirely.
sponsor_ads.tagline: One verified report equals one free corporate rebranding session.

sponsor_ads.headline: Atomic Loyalty Lozenge: Tastes Like Compliance, Lasts 14 Hours
sponsor_ads.body: Dissolve one tablet before entering the Kkorr-Vvax queue and maintain perfect corporate form without a single molt, even under extreme verification lights.
sponsor_ads.tagline: Not for use in actual nations; glowing may persist until next board meeting.

stories.headline: Kkorr-Vvax Scales Now Mandatory for All Corporate Fealty Tallying
stories.deck: Firms report brisk trade in brass counterweights as personality layers stack up
stories.article:
Verification has moved to open reef platforms lit by atomic lamps. Each layer rests on calibrated brass pans while clerks enter decimal values into hyperdense-membrane ledgers.

Three reef-arcologies have already duplicated the scales in board chambers to keep quarterly loyalty quotas on schedule.

stories.headline: New Protocol Weighs Molted Personality Residue at 0.07 Microns Per Hour
stories.deck: Laboratory confirms residue can be reprocessed into loyalty tokens if submitted before next molt cycle
stories.article:
The Umbral Reach Crystallographic Institute has tuned the scales to register personality mass shed during the annual molt. Anything thinner than one lattice facet registers as insufficient loyalty and triggers an automatic queue summons.

Residue collectors now sit at every station; incomplete collection postpones the next round of citizenship benefits.

stories.headline: Temple of the Eternal Lattice Declares Scales a Sacred Instrument
stories.deck: Priests now require devotees to present weighed personality samples before evening pulse rites
stories.article:
Clerics have placed the brass scales on bioluminescent altars at dawn as relics of the First Facet. Worshippers must deposit a verified sample before receiving the annual blessing that wards off premature molting.

Those arriving with unweighed layers are sent to the fourteen-hour queue to contemplate the weight of their devotion.

real_world_echo: New EU border system tripling time at passport control, mirrored as a new loyalty verification mandate that triples processing time at corporate-citizenship checkpoints after the prior bureau's molt
